description: In this episode of Chewing Glass, host Scott Hague interviews Scott, the founder of Fluxbeam (Fluxbot), discussing his journey in software development, particularly in the gaming sector, and his recent success at the hyperdrive hackathon.
topic_summary: Scott shares his background in software development, starting from gaming at a young age, and his evolution into machine learning applications. He discusses his experiences with hackathons and the Solana ecosystem [t=39:18].
